design_philosophy.core_loop: Select teams/players, execute real-time hockey matches through directional controls and action buttons, manage player rosters and trades between games
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Real-time positional play and timing-based shooting/passing against opponent AI or human players; resource management of team roster through trades and player releases
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Manage and compete as a real NHL team with authentic rosters, customize lineups, and experience arcade-paced hockey action with high responsiveness
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Prioritizes arcade speed and responsiveness over simulation; Genesis version celebrated for 'unbelievably blazing speed' and control fidelity. Opinionated roster management system (sign, trade, release real players) and fantasy player creation. Platform-specific philosophy: Genesis version emphasizes speed and features; SNES version stripped of content (shootout mode, playoff mode, fake shots, drop-passes) due to technical constraints, showing EA's willingness to degrade experience rather than compromise core philosophy

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Player controls team composition and player attributes; matchup difficulty varies by opponent team selection; advanced statistics tracking allows skill-based progression

progression.upgrade_system: Team roster management: sign real NHL players, trade players between teams, release players; create custom fantasy players with assignable attributes
progression.unlock_mechanism: Season/playoff progression unlocks through match victories; roster customization available from start
replayability_hooks: Multiple game modes (season, playoff, shootout on Genesis version)
Fantasy player creation with custom attributes
Real player rosters reflective of 1994-95 NHL season

world_building_techniques: Authentic NHL team rosters and player names grounding game in real sports universe
Seasonal context (1994-95 NHL season reflected in rosters)
Commentary and realistic sound effects enhancing sports authenticity

faction_indicators: Team selection (real NHL teams represent organizational affiliation)
Player roster composition reflects team identity and region
environmental_storytelling: Arena environments represent real NHL venues
Player statistics and performance history provide contextual background

sources_used: wikipedia: NHL 95 - Reception section, GamePro review quotes, Next Generation review quotes, Flux magazine review
